headline: Q4 Earnings Recap: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) Tops Semiconductor Manufacturing Stocks
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q4 semiconductor manufacturing earnings season.
